emails.subject: FW: UPDATE - Supported Internet Email Addresses
emails.body: FW: UPDATE Supported Internet Email Addresses I wanted to make sure you saw this, I think you are going to have to start using Debra.Perlingiere@enron.com now otherwise your mail will start getting non-deliveries. I'll confirm with the messaging group but it sounds like your first instincts were right.

emails.subject: RE: UPDATE - Supported Internet Email Addresses
emails.body: RE: UPDATE Supported Internet Email Addresses Thanks, do I need to do anything to my outlook?

emails.subject: RE: UPDATE - Supported Internet Email Addresses
emails.body: No, as most of this sounds like it will be done on the back-end, what you will probably need to tell people is that instead of emailing to the address you have been giving them, email instead to Debra.Perlingiere@enron.com. It will get routed automatically.
